Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Marvin Harrell.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Tracey Sparks is present.
Attorney Teecia Kimura representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsels and litigants confer in hallway.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of AUG-20-2012 is vacated.
